summary: Re-anchored the opening on Lale moving through the scrubbed market so it no longer repeats chapter 8's time-led opening scaffold, and named the Bitter Thread in the exit to tighten the handoff into the next chapter's deck scene.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start from the market's physical state and Lale's movement instead of a matching 'By [time]' construction.
Kept the same opening facts: noon light, the scrubbed market, the lingering corpse-stink, and Lale avoiding the sightlines outward.
Added the Bitter Thread to the closing walkway beat so chapter 7 exits closer to chapter 8's immediate boat setting.
